Sierra Leone • Beach seafood

The Place Resort Restaurant

Beach dining on the peninsula is strongest when tied to the resort or beach base, especially for travelers who want predictable service and transfers.

★ 4.3 167 reviews
Image slot Restaurant The Place Resort Restaurant

About this restaurant

Beach dining on the peninsula is strongest when tied to the resort or beach base, especially for travelers who want predictable service and transfers.

Signature dish

Grilled lobster, fish, rice dishes, and beach meals

Practical information

Confirm road transfer timing before dinner if staying outside Tokeh.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Tokeh & River No. 2 Beach.
